/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/RPI_MediaServer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/RPI_MediaServer.dir/src/ai/detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPI_MediaServer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPI_MediaServer.dir/src/pipeline/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPI_MediaServer.dir/src/utils/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPI_MediaServer.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o -o RPI_MediaServer  -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lavfilter -lavdevice -lpthread
